case_title: KIRK DEL PRETE VS. CHIHSIEN LEE et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-09-2010 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LEE, CHIHSIEN LEE, DIANA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT DEL PRETE, KIRK STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY DEL PRETE, KIRK AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, CHIHSIEN LEE, DIANA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-09-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED AUG-05-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, CHIHSIEN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-09-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-09-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS. DEFENDANT DIANA LEE WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-09-2010 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT (FEE FOR SERVICE:$88.50) SERVED AUG-23-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT DEL PRETE, KIRK

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LEE, CHIHSIEN LEE, DIANA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT DEL PRETE, KIRK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-09-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE ON CROSS DEFENDANT; FILED BY DEFENDANT LEE, DIANA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT DEL PRETE, KIRK
